title: Swimlane
description: The OpenCTI Swimlane connector imports records from a Swimlane application into OpenCTI as STIX Case-Incidents. It periodically fetches records through the Swimlane REST API and converts them to STIX 2.1 Case-Incidents (with timestamps and an external reference), since Swimlane is a case-management (SOAR) platform, so SOC cases managed in Swimlane can be correlated and enriched with the threat intelligence curated in OpenCTI.
short_description: Import Swimlane application records into OpenCTI as STIX Case-Incidents.
